title: Personal settings
subtitle: Your preferences apply in every customer environment.
languageHelp: The application is shown directly in the selected language.
themeHelp: Choose an appearance that feels comfortable on your screen.
clockHelp: Choose how the clock appears in your Time Hub.
invalid: Check your language and theme selection.
unauthenticated: Sign in again to save your settings.

admin.title: Settings
admin.subtitle: Manage this customer environment. You only see sections you are authorized to use.

tiles.authorizationDescription: Manage roles, permissions, scopes and the graphical authorization overview.
tiles.employeesDescription: Open employee management and employee cards.
tiles.customFieldsDescription: Manage additional fields for employees and employments.
tiles.jobsDescription: Maintain jobs and job groups per administration over time.
tiles.salaryDescription: Manage effective salary scales, revisions and steps.
tiles.holidaysDescription: Import national holidays and add local dates.
tiles.modulesDescription: Enable or disable available extra modules tenant-wide.
tiles.dashboardWidgetsDescription: Choose which data-driven widgets are available per role.

modules.title: Active modules
modules.subtitle: Choose which extra modules are available across the customer environment. Core functionality always remains active.

HERA.name: HeRa
HERA.description: The secure HR assistant for analysis and guided actions.

DOCUMENTS.name: Document files
DOCUMENTS.description: Documents, metadata, audiences and expiry reminders per employee.

REMINDERS.name: Reminders
REMINDERS.description: Personal and HR reminders targeting roles, organization chart and people.

LEAVE.name: Leave
LEAVE.description: Leave registration and balances in the employee calendar.

ASSETS.name: Assets
ASSETS.description: Issue and return company assets per employee.

WORKFLOWS.name: Workflows
WORKFLOWS.description: Repeatable HR processes for onboarding, changes and offboarding.

TRAINING.name: Training
TRAINING.description: Training, certificates and validity per employee.

dashboardWidgets.title: Dashboard widgets
dashboardWidgets.subtitle: Enable data-driven widgets and choose which roles can use them.

holidays.title: Public holidays
holidays.subtitle: Import national holidays by calendar year and country. The import is stored as a snapshot; local and excluded dates are preserved when re-importing.
holidays.providerFailed: The holiday provider is currently unavailable or the input is invalid.
holidays.empty: No holidays for this year yet.

themeDescriptions.liquid-navy: Clear navy blue with a calm, bright workspace.
themeDescriptions.noordzee: Cool blue-green with fresh maritime accents.
themeDescriptions.bos: Deep green with natural, calm contrasts.
themeDescriptions.warm-zand: Warm neutral tones for a soft workspace.
themeDescriptions.aubergine: Refined purple with warm, professional depth.
themeDescriptions.nacht: A complete dark theme for low-light environments.
